## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for Lovable Templates project, focusing on template workflow, design, and launch strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Template strategy: Focus on portfolio websites initially; George to provide more specific categories](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Launch approach: Progressive launch favored over big launch; aim for \~5 templates ready by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Workflow: Georgemaine working on template blocks; Nico on pipeline and gallery production](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [SEO strategy: George shared Airtable with competitor research, keywords, and template categories](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Topics

### Template Strategy and Prioritization

  - [George shared Airtable with 5,000+ competitor URLs, keywords, search volume, and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Portfolio websites identified as high-priority due to search volume](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Team to break down broad categories (e.g., portfolio) into specific types (photography, artist, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [George to provide more detailed list of template categories to target next](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### Template Development Workflow

  - [Georgemaine focusing on getting template blocks right](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Successfully used Claude AI to generate design from screenshots consistently](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Exploring methods to scale template creation:](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
    1.  Feeding URLs of live pages (limited by URL availability)
    2.  Bulk image input for rapid template generation, followed by human review

### Launch Strategy and Minimum Viable Product

  - [Aiming for progressive launch rather than big launch](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Discussed minimum template library for launch (\~50 templates suggested)](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Need to define features required for each template category (e.g., author page, blog post page for blogs)](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Plan to emulate best examples from competitors like Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Nico working on resolving deployment issues for guide section](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Exploring Remix feature implementation; may need Lovable team's input](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Considering adding a prompt box for direct template remixing](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Evaluating need for database vs. static MD files for SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Design and Content

  - [All designs cleared NAD's comments](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - ["About This Template" section content still to be determined; not blocking progress](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### SEO and Sitemap

  - [George shared sitemap for Lovable with Nico](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Nico to sync with Kirkland and potentially Forkhan on sitemap updates](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Georgemaine: Develop \~5 templates by Wednesday; provide list of required features per template category](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Nico: Resolve deployment issues; make gallery production-ready; investigate Remix feature implementation](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [George: Flesh out template strategy for Wednesday client meeting; continue motion work](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Team: Aim to have 5+ blogs published and templates page live by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Nico: Confirm progressive launch approach with client](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [George: Consider content strategy for "About This Template" section](https://fathom.video/share/jJ1sh2tCPzvox3yXb76iCB9XvBk96xoL?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
